Video.summary: From “Nosferatu” to “Dracula,” everyone loves blood-sucking Vampires!
Video.title: Viva La Vampire!!

Video.summary: Passengers aboard a Trans-Siberian Express train must fight to stay alive after a prehistoric creature escapes captivity and begins a murder spree.
Video.title: Horror Express

Video.summary: Journey back to the 1950s and 60s, where science and imagination brought forth a new wave of classic films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Monsters, aliens, mutants, and more! Who will save us from cinema's most terrifying atomic-era creatures?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's a wild blast from the past, as atomic monsters, aliens, and more invade your living room!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the depths of space (and deeper), comes an all-new collection of intergalactic invaders and futuristic fears!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Hammer hits to Corman classics and more, these movies made Christopher Lee a horror icon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Christopher Lee: From Fangs to Frights
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Norman Bates to Michael Myers and more, these killers love carving up the screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers take you inside Britain's iconic Hammer Film factory.
Video.title: Hammered Horror Vol. 1

Video.summary: Take a journey into the heart of Hammer horror with today's top filmmakers.
Video.title: Hammered Horror Vol. 2

Video.summary: From frozen fights to winter warfare, it's a blizzard of bone-chilling big screen action hits!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A down-on-his-luck Humphrey Bogart teams with a group of crooks chasing their fortune in British East Africa.
Video.title: Beat the Devil

Video.summary: Science fiction dominated cinema screens in the 1980s, and these are the ones we'll always remember.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In these sci-fi classics, no one is quite who they seem, and the threat of invasion is closer than you think.
Video.grandparentTitle: Impostor Syndrome: The Best of Big Screen Body Snatchers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "The Big Sleep" to "Casablanca" and beyond, this is the best of Humphrey Bogart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrating the timeless tales of heroes, gods, and epic battles that defined classic cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers look back at the movies influenced by famous literary works.
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dive deeper into the classic books that became Hollywood blockbusters!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Stephen King to Kurt Vonnegut, Hollywood brings your favorite books to the big screen!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 3
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Video.summary: From 'Bonnie and Clyde' to 'Duck Soup,' filmmaker John Landis talks his favorite film trailers.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity
The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity
The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Frank Sinatra was nominated for an Academy Award for Best Actor for his portrayal of Frankie Machine, a former drug addict struggling with sobriety after he’s released from prison. Though Frankie dreams of a music career, he finds himself caught up in a web of lies, betrayal, and murder that could eventually lead to his downfall. Based on the novel by Nelson Algren, The Man With the Golden Arm was added to the National Film Registry by the Library of Congress in 2020.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Man with the Golden Arm
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Seven guests, a newly hired secretary and two staff are gathered at a manor house on an isolated island by an unknown absentee host and are killed off one-by-one. They work together to determine who the killer is before it's too late.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director and storyteller Mick Garris shares his personal film favorites and the stories behind them.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante highlights Hollywood's atomic age paranoia and the nightmares unleashed on unsuspecting audiences.
Video.grandparentTitle: Joe Dante Enters the Atomic Age
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Vol. 2, screenwriter Josh Olson talks Brian De Palma, Michael Mann, and more!
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Josh Olson Volume 2

Video.summary: 'Girlfight' director Karyn Kusama joins Trailers from Hell to talk about her favorite films.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Karyn Kusama

Video.summary: Filmmaker Ernest Dickerson talks his favorite Westerns and more.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Ernest Dickerson

Video.summary: Masterful movie maker Mick Garris joins Trailers from Hell to talk about his favorite films.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Mick Garris Volume 1

Video.summary: Mick Garris returns with more action-packed trailers and influential classics.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Mick Garris Volume 2

Video.summary: Screenwriter Larry Karaszewski talks about the classic films that have influenced his career.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Karaszewski Klassics

Video.summary: 'A History of Violence' screenwriter Josh Olson talks about his favorite films.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Josh Olson Volume 1

Video.summary: Allan Arkush delves into the world of movie music and the concert films that have wowed audiences for decades.
Video.title: The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush
